name: Sour Cream Coffee Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
2. Grease and flour Angel Cake pan or other large ring type pan.
3. Cream the margarine, butter, and shortening with the sugar until light and fluffy.
4. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
5. Mix in sour cream, vanilla extract.
6. Gradually add dry ingredients (flour, baking powder, baking soda, salt) alternating with sour cream, mixing well after each addition.
7. Divide batter into two portions and divide the cinnamon mixture equally between them.
8. Pour one portion of batter into the prepared pan and sprinkle with half the cinnamon mixture.
9. Add remaining batter and sprinkle remaining cinnamon mixture on top.
10. Bake for 45 minutes or more until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
